text: <s>[INST] How can I track my order? [/INST] To track your order, please log in to your account and visit the 'Order History' section. You will find a tracking number next to your recent shipment. Alternatively, you can click the link in your shipping confirmation email.</s>

<s>[INST] I received a damaged item. What should I do? [/INST] I'm so sorry to hear that! Please send a photo of the damaged item and your order number to support@example.com. We will arrange a replacement or a full refund immediately at no extra cost to you.</s>

<s>[INST] What is your return policy? [/INST] We offer a 30-day hassle-free return policy. Items must be in their original packaging and unused. You can initiate a return through our online portal or by contacting our support team directly.</s>

<s>[INST] Do you ship internationally? [/INST] Yes, we ship to over 50 countries! Shipping costs and delivery times vary by location. You can see the exact rates for your country during the checkout process before you finalize your purchase.</s>

<s>[INST] I want to cancel my subscription. [/INST] I can certainly help with that. You can cancel anytime by going to 'Settings' > 'Subscriptions' in your dashboard. If you have any trouble, just let me know and I can process the cancellation for you manually.</s>

<s>[INST] Can I change my shipping address after an order is placed? [/INST] We can change the address if the order hasn't been processed by our warehouse yet (usually within 2 hours). Please reply with your new address immediately so we can attempt to update it for you!</s>

<s>[INST] My discount code isn't working. [/INST] I'm sorry for the frustration. Please ensure the code hasn't expired and that your cart meets the minimum spend requirement. If it still fails, please share the code with me so I can check its status for you.</s>
